# Proyecto Análisis de Regresión
### Grupo 6 - SAT-GPA

```{r}
install.packages("here")
install.packages("tidyverse")
install.packages("xtable")
``` 
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(xtable)
# Cargar datos
library(here)
satgpa <- read_csv(here("data", "satgpa_clean.csv"))
```

```{r}
# train test split
set.seed(2307)
train_indices <- sample(1:nrow(satgpa), size = 0.8 * nrow(satgpa))
satgpa_train <- satgpa[train_indices, ]
satgpa_test <- satgpa[-train_indices, ]

satgpa_train$sex_factor <- as.factor(satgpa_train$sex_factor)
satgpa_test$sex_factor  <- factor(satgpa_test$sex_factor,
                                  levels = levels(satgpa_train$sex_factor))
```

```{r}
# primer modelo
# solo hs_gpa, con intercepto
modelo_hs_gpa <- lm(fy_gpa ~ hs_gpa, data = satgpa_train)

# ajuste
summary(modelo_hs_gpa)
confint(modelo_hs_gpa, level = 0.95)

# predicción
pred_test <- predict(modelo_hs_gpa, newdata = satgpa_test)

# métricas de evaluación
rmse <- sqrt(mean((satgpa_test$fy_gpa - pred_test)^2))
mae  <- mean(abs(satgpa_test$fy_gpa - pred_test))

sse <- sum((satgpa_test$fy_gpa - pred_test)^2)
sst <- sum((satgpa_test$fy_gpa - mean(satgpa_test$fy_gpa))^2)
r2_pred <- 1 - sse/sst

c(RMSE = rmse, MAE = mae, R2_pred = r2_pred)

# intervalo de confianza de la media condicional E[y|x]
ic_media <- predict(modelo_hs_gpa, newdata = satgpa_test,
                    interval = "confidence", level = 0.95)

# intervalo de predicción para una observación individual
ip_ind <- predict(modelo_hs_gpa, newdata = satgpa_test,
                  interval = "prediction", level = 0.95)

head(ic_media)
head(ip_ind)
```

```{r}
# segundo modelo
# hs_gpa + sat_sum
modelo_hs_sats <- lm(fy_gpa ~ hs_gpa + sat_sum, data = satgpa_train)
# ajuste
summary(modelo_hs_sats)
confint(modelo_hs_sats, level = 0.95)
# predicción
pred_test_hs_sats <- predict(modelo_hs_sats, newdata = satgpa_test)
# métricas de evaluación
rmse <- sqrt(mean((satgpa_test$fy_gpa - pred_test_hs_sats)^2))
mae  <- mean(abs(satgpa_test$fy_gpa - pred_test_hs_sats))

sse <- sum((satgpa_test$fy_gpa - pred_test_hs_sats)^2)
sst <- sum((satgpa_test$fy_gpa - mean(satgpa_test$fy_gpa))^2)
r2_pred <- 1 - sse/sst

c(RMSE = rmse, MAE = mae, R2_pred = r2_pred)

# intervalo de confianza de la media condicional E[y|x]
ic_media <- predict(modelo_hs_sats, newdata = satgpa_test,
                    interval = "confidence", level = 0.95)

# intervalo de predicción para una observación individual
ip_ind <- predict(modelo_hs_sats, newdata = satgpa_test,
                  interval = "prediction", level = 0.95)

head(ic_media)
head(ip_ind)
```

```{r}
# tercer modelo
# hs_gpa + sat_v + sat_m
modelo_hs_sats_v_m <- lm(fy_gpa ~ hs_gpa + sat_v + sat_m, data = satgpa_train)
# ajuste
summary(modelo_hs_sats_v_m)
confint(modelo_hs_sats_v_m, level = 0.95)
# predicción
pred_test_hs_sats_v_m <- predict(modelo_hs_sats_v_m, newdata = satgpa_test)
# métricas de evaluación
rmse <- sqrt(mean((satgpa_test$fy_gpa - pred_test_hs_sats_v_m)^2))
mae  <- mean(abs(satgpa_test$fy_gpa - pred_test_hs_sats_v_m))

sse <- sum((satgpa_test$fy_gpa - pred_test_hs_sats_v_m)^2)
sst <- sum((satgpa_test$fy_gpa - mean(satgpa_test$fy_gpa))^2)
r2_pred <- 1 - sse/sst

c(RMSE = rmse, MAE = mae, R2_pred = r2_pred)

# intervalo de confianza de la media condicional E[y|x]
ic_media <- predict(modelo_hs_sats_v_m, newdata = satgpa_test,
                    interval = "confidence", level = 0.95)

# intervalo de predicción para una observación individual
ip_ind <- predict(modelo_hs_sats_v_m, newdata = satgpa_test,
                  interval = "prediction", level = 0.95)

head(ic_media)
head(ip_ind)
```

```{r}
# cuarto modelo
# hs_gpa + sat_v + sat_m + sex_factor
modelo_full <- lm(fy_gpa ~ hs_gpa + sat_v + sat_m + sex_factor, data = satgpa_train)
# ajuste
summary(modelo_full)
confint(modelo_full, level = 0.95)
# predicción
pred_test_full <- predict(modelo_full, newdata = satgpa_test)
# métricas de evaluación
rmse <- sqrt(mean((satgpa_test$fy_gpa - pred_test_full)^2))
mae  <- mean(abs(satgpa_test$fy_gpa - pred_test_full))

sse <- sum((satgpa_test$fy_gpa - pred_test_full)^2)
sst <- sum((satgpa_test$fy_gpa - mean(satgpa_test$fy_gpa))^2)
r2_pred <- 1 - sse/sst

c(RMSE = rmse, MAE = mae, R2_pred = r2_pred)

# intervalo de confianza de la media condicional E[y|x]
ic_media <- predict(modelo_full, newdata = satgpa_test,
                    interval = "confidence", level = 0.95)

# intervalo de predicción para una observación individual
ip_ind <- predict(modelo_full, newdata = satgpa_test,
                  interval = "prediction", level = 0.95)

head(ic_media)
head(ip_ind)
```

```{r}
# quinto modelo (Modelo de Interacción)
# hs_gpa + sat_v + sat_m + sex_factor + interacción (sat_m con sex_factor)
modelo_inter <- lm(fy_gpa ~ hs_gpa + sat_v + sat_m * sex_factor, data = satgpa_train)

# NOTA: En R, 'sat_m * sex_factor' es equivalente a escribir:
# 'sat_m + sex_factor + sat_m:sex_factor'

# ajuste
summary(modelo_inter)
confint(modelo_inter, level = 0.95)

# predicción
pred_test_inter <- predict(modelo_inter, newdata = satgpa_test)

# métricas de evaluación
rmse <- sqrt(mean((satgpa_test$fy_gpa - pred_test_inter)^2))
mae  <- mean(abs(satgpa_test$fy_gpa - pred_test_inter))

sse <- sum((satgpa_test$fy_gpa - pred_test_inter)^2)
sst <- sum((satgpa_test$fy_gpa - mean(satgpa_test$fy_gpa))^2)
r2_pred <- 1 - sse/sst

c(RMSE = rmse, MAE = mae, R2_pred = r2_pred)

# intervalo de confianza de la media condicional E[y|x]
ic_media <- predict(modelo_inter, newdata = satgpa_test,
                    interval = "confidence", level = 0.95)

# intervalo de predicción para una observación individual
ip_ind <- predict(modelo_inter, newdata = satgpa_test,
                  interval = "prediction", level = 0.95)

head(ic_media)
head(ip_ind)
```

```{r}
# sexto modelo (Interacción sat_v × sex_factor)
# hs_gpa + sat_m + sat_v * sex_factor
modelo_inter2 <- lm(fy_gpa ~ hs_gpa + sat_m + sat_v * sex_factor, data = satgpa_train)

summary(modelo_inter2)
confint(modelo_inter2, level = 0.95)

pred_test_inter2 <- predict(modelo_inter2, newdata = satgpa_test)

rmse <- sqrt(mean((satgpa_test$fy_gpa - pred_test_inter2)^2))
mae  <- mean(abs(satgpa_test$fy_gpa - pred_test_inter2))

sse <- sum((satgpa_test$fy_gpa - pred_test_inter2)^2)
sst <- sum((satgpa_test$fy_gpa - mean(satgpa_test$fy_gpa))^2)
r2_pred <- 1 - sse/sst

c(RMSE = rmse, MAE = mae, R2_pred = r2_pred)

ic_media <- predict(modelo_inter2, newdata = satgpa_test,
                    interval = "confidence", level = 0.95)
ip_ind <- predict(modelo_inter2, newdata = satgpa_test,
                  interval = "prediction", level = 0.95)

head(ic_media)
head(ip_ind)
```

```{r}
# séptimo modelo (Ambas interacciones con sex_factor: sat_v y sat_m)
# hs_gpa + (sat_v + sat_m) * sex_factor
modelo_inter3 <- lm(fy_gpa ~ hs_gpa + (sat_v + sat_m) * sex_factor, data = satgpa_train)

summary(modelo_inter3)
confint(modelo_inter3, level = 0.95)

pred_test_inter3 <- predict(modelo_inter3, newdata = satgpa_test)

rmse <- sqrt(mean((satgpa_test$fy_gpa - pred_test_inter3)^2))
mae  <- mean(abs(satgpa_test$fy_gpa - pred_test_inter3))

sse <- sum((satgpa_test$fy_gpa - pred_test_inter3)^2)
sst <- sum((satgpa_test$fy_gpa - mean(satgpa_test$fy_gpa))^2)
r2_pred <- 1 - sse/sst

c(RMSE = rmse, MAE = mae, R2_pred = r2_pred)

ic_media <- predict(modelo_inter3, newdata = satgpa_test,
                    interval = "confidence", level = 0.95)
ip_ind <- predict(modelo_inter3, newdata = satgpa_test,
                  interval = "prediction", level = 0.95)

head(ic_media)
head(ip_ind)
```

```{r}
# octavo modelo (Todas las interacciones con sex_factor: hs_gpa, sat_v y sat_m)
# (hs_gpa + sat_v + sat_m) * sex_factor
modelo_inter4 <- lm(fy_gpa ~ (hs_gpa + sat_v + sat_m) * sex_factor, data = satgpa_train)

summary(modelo_inter4)
confint(modelo_inter4, level = 0.95)

pred_test_inter4 <- predict(modelo_inter4, newdata = satgpa_test)

rmse <- sqrt(mean((satgpa_test$fy_gpa - pred_test_inter4)^2))
mae  <- mean(abs(satgpa_test$fy_gpa - pred_test_inter4))

sse <- sum((satgpa_test$fy_gpa - pred_test_inter4)^2)
sst <- sum((satgpa_test$fy_gpa - mean(satgpa_test$fy_gpa))^2)
r2_pred <- 1 - sse/sst

c(RMSE = rmse, MAE = mae, R2_pred = r2_pred)

ic_media <- predict(modelo_inter4, newdata = satgpa_test,
                    interval = "confidence", level = 0.95)
ip_ind <- predict(modelo_inter4, newdata = satgpa_test,
                  interval = "prediction", level = 0.95)

head(ic_media)
head(ip_ind)
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# Tests F parciales (modelos anidados)
# ============================================================

# M4 → M5: ¿aporta sat_m:sex_factor?
anova(modelo_full, modelo_inter)

# M4 → M6: ¿aporta sat_v:sex_factor?
anova(modelo_full, modelo_inter2)

# M4 → M7: ¿aportan juntos sat_m:sex_factor + sat_v:sex_factor?
anova(modelo_full, modelo_inter3)

# M4 → M8: ¿aportan todas las interacciones con sex_factor?
anova(modelo_full, modelo_inter4)

# M5 → M7: dado sat_m:sex_factor, ¿aporta además sat_v:sex_factor?
anova(modelo_inter, modelo_inter3)

# M6 → M7: dado sat_v:sex_factor, ¿aporta además sat_m:sex_factor?
anova(modelo_inter2, modelo_inter3)

# M7 → M8: dado sat_v:sex_factor + sat_m:sex_factor, ¿aporta hs_gpa:sex_factor?
anova(modelo_inter3, modelo_inter4)
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# Comparación global: AIC y BIC
# ============================================================
AIC(modelo_hs_gpa, modelo_hs_sats, modelo_hs_sats_v_m,
    modelo_full, modelo_inter, modelo_inter2, modelo_inter3, modelo_inter4)

BIC(modelo_hs_gpa, modelo_hs_sats, modelo_hs_sats_v_m,
    modelo_full, modelo_inter, modelo_inter2, modelo_inter3, modelo_inter4)
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# Selección stepwise (criterio AIC, partiendo del modelo completo)
# ============================================================
modelo_step <- step(modelo_inter4, direction = "both", trace = 1)
summary(modelo_step)
```
